summary: auth from-1password no-ops before any live verifyLogin call when --login-check or --sync-profile is requested under PRINTING_PRESS_VERIFY, matching the standalone auth sync-profile guard.
reason: The verifier must never contact the live MasterPark verifyLogin endpoint; without this guard the 1Password login/profile path would post real credentials during PRINTING_PRESS_VERIFY=1 runs, unlike auth sync-profile which already no-ops.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli covers from-1password --sync-profile and --login-check under PRINTING_PRESS_VERIFY=1: returns verify_noop, the test HTTP server is never contacted, and no config is written even with --save.
